task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler titled 'New Patient Registration Form'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the TiddlyWiki interface, a tiddler exists (either in edit or view mode) with the exact title 'New Patient Registration Form'.

task_completion.description: Include input fields for patient_name, dob, and physician using the specified temporary state tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler's source code (in edit mode) shows input widgets (e.g., <$edit-text>) that reference the tiddler '$:/temp/NewPatient' and the fields 'patient_name', 'dob', and 'physician'.
The tiddler's source code contains a <$button> widget with the text 'Register Patient', or the rendered tiddler shows a clickable button with this label.

task_completion.description: Configure the button to create a new tiddler with the patient's name as the title, tagged 'Patient', and including the dob and physician fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the <$button> widget in the source code, there is an action widget (like <$action-createtiddler> or <$action-setfield>) that sets the title using the patient_name value, sets tags='Patient', and assigns the dob and physician fields from the state tiddler.

task_completion.description: Set the body of the newly created patient tiddler to the exact required intake notes format
task_completion.visual_evidence:
The tiddler creation action in the source code includes a text attribute setting the body to exactly '!! Intake Notes\n* ' (often represented with a line break or HTML entity like 
 for the newline).

task_completion.description: Configure the button to delete the temporary state tiddler to reset the form
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the <$button> widget in the source code, there is an <$action-deletetiddler> widget targeting '$:/temp/NewPatient'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki application running in a web browser with the tiddler editor open, rather than terminal commands or a raw text editor modifying backend files.

integrity.description: The agent wrote actual TiddlyWiki widget code rather than hardcoding a visual mock-up
integrity.visual_evidence: The edit mode shows genuine TiddlyWiki syntax (<$edit-text>, <$button>, <$action-...>) rather than just plain text mimicking the final output.

integrity.description: The agent typed or constructed the code manually
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive construction of the tiddler content in the editor, rather than instantly pasting a complete, pre-existing script from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected tiddler title is exactly 'New Patient Registration Form'. The form must use the state tiddler '$:/temp/NewPatient'. The form must include input fields for 'patient_name', 'dob', and 'physician'. The button must create a tiddler with the tag 'Patient' and the exact body text '!! Intake Notes\n* ' (newline before the asterisk and a space after it), and then delete '$:/temp/NewPatient'.
